remarks: ***Highest & Best 7/21 @5P*** Welcome to 222 Silver Hill Lane, where timeless Cape Cod charm meets thoughtful modern updates on a picturesque 2/3-acre level property. Brimming with storybook curb appeal, this light-filled home has been refreshed with freshly painted interiors, refinished maple hardwood floors, stylish new lighting, updated bath vanities, and central air. The inviting living room features a wood-burning fireplace, while the spacious eat-in kitchen with a charming bay window is ideal for everyday living and entertaining. The cozy family room showcases custom built-ins and a picturesque window overlooking the private backyard and the five acres of protected conservation land beyond. An adjoining breezeway offers flexible space for a mudroom, home office, or sitting room, with sliders opening to a large deck and backyard. The versatile floor plan includes a first-floor bedroom with an adjacent full bath, plus two additional bedrooms and a full bath upstairs, including a spacious primary closet. Professionally landscaped grounds, mature trees, striking rock outcroppings, and a sprawling yard create an idyllic setting for entertaining, gardening, play, or quiet relaxation. Blending vintage character with thoughtful updates, this move-in-ready home offers warmth, charm, and modern comfort in a peaceful Stamford setting, ideally located midway between I-95 and the Merritt Parkway, just minutes from downtown Stamford, Metro-North, shopping, parks & everyday amenities
